attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_RULES_ALL)

attributes.Sql Query:

STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.START_PERIOD_YEAR, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.END_PERIOD_YEAR, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.START_PERIOD_NUM, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.END_PERIOD_NUM, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.DIST_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.THEATRE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.SEQUENCE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.PERCENTAGE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ACCOUNT_1, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.DEST_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.DEST_CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.COMPANY_CODE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.DEPARTMENT, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.LOCATION, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.SUBACCOUNT, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.PROJECT, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ELEMENT_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL,
 (
 select  APPLICATION_ID ,RULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL
 minus
 select  APPLICATION_ID ,RULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_REVENUE_RULES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.APPLICATION_ID = STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.APPLICATION_ID and ACM.RULE_ID=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.RULE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_RVNU_RULES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME
